candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee threshold of 10 in the financial year.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: turnover_threshold_exceeded
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold of 900,000 euros (excluding VAT) in the financial year.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold of 450,000 euros in the financial year.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: is_micro_company
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company in the given financial year under the statutory definition.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: is_subsidiary
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The company is a subsidiary of another company.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: is_parent_company
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The company is a parent company of another company.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: is_small_company
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The company qualifies as a small company in the given financial year.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: annual_average_employees
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The annual net turnover of the company excluding value added tax in the financial year, in euros.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: balance_sheet_total
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euros.

secondary_diagnostics_text:
missing_helper_definition (legal-effect context=True):
  helper: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded (signature=Company * FinancialYear -> Bool; kind=cardinality; hints=cardinality, threshold)
  repair: define 'more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded' in THEN with rules, or reclassify as case_input/background only if safe; do not rename without defining.
  threshold hint: prefer pairwise/conjunctive THEN definitions ((A&B) OR (A&C) OR (B&C)) for more-than-one helpers.
  missing_temporal_support_symbol: true (escalate to symbols repair)
  legal-output THEN predicate(s): is_micro_company
  - rules[3].if
  - rules[4].if negated -> THEN: is_micro_company
  - rules[5].if -> THEN: is_micro_company
  threshold helper candidates:
    - employee_threshold_exceeded (helper)
    - turnover_threshold_exceeded (helper)
    - balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded (helper)
    - more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded (helper)
  temporal relation candidates: (none in symbol table)
  other lower-level symbols:
    - employee_threshold_exceeded (helper)
    - turnover_threshold_exceeded (helper)
    - balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded (helper)
    - is_micro_company (derived)
    - has_legal_personality (observable)
    - is_subsidiary (observable)
    - is_parent_company (observable)
    - is_small_company (observable)
missing_temporal_support_symbol: true
repair_route: symbols_repair_required
